title: October 2025 Lush Kitchen XL Unboxing
caption_used:
Unboxing October's Kitchen box - some of these have been on wishlists 🕷️📦🖤 
Lush Notebook: The little extras that make Kitchen special 📖✨ 
Incantation Shower Gel: Witchy vibes not 100% if it's the scent we've been craving but I'll take the colour🌙🧴 
Frog Spell Shower Gummy: Bouncy texture meets Halloween magic 🐸🔮 
Toil and Trouble Body Scrub: Those mini bats sitting on top took me right back to 2022 Halloween release 🦇⚡ 
Wizard Bubble Bar: Always impossible to guess the scent but that's the magic 🧙‍♂️💫 
Burning Rosemary Incense: Herbal and mystical, perfect autumn energy 🍂🔥 
Serpent Potion Body Butter: Slithering into skincare moisturising and protect season 🐍💚 
Magic Bath Bomb: Been waiting for this one - Kitchen finally delivered! ⭐🛁
nostalgia_notes: Lush Notebook: A charming non-cosmetic extra that delights subscribers, reminiscent of Lush's tradition of including fun branded extras in special boxes.
Lush Notebook: A non-cosmetic branded item included as a bonus in the October 2025 Lush Kitchen XL subscription box.
Lush Notebook: Continues Lush's tradition of including lifestyle and stationery extras in special subscription and gift sets.
Incantation shower gel: A spellbinding Halloween Kitchen release that fans eagerly anticipate each autumn season.
Incantation shower gel: A seasonal Halloween Kitchen product, part of Lush's annual witchy autumn lineup.
Incantation shower gel: Part of Lush's annual Halloween Kitchen spellbook-themed collection, evoking dark botanical and witchy scent traditions.
Frog Spell shower gummy: Part of Lush's beloved Halloween Kitchen exclusives, a product format fans look forward to each year.
Frog Spell shower gummy: A Halloween Kitchen exclusive shower gummy, part of the autumnal spellbook-themed range.
Frog Spell shower gummy: A nod to classic witch's familiar imagery — the frog as a magical creature — rendered in Lush's playful shower gummy format.
Toil and Trouble body scrub: Named after the famous Macbeth incantation, this Halloween Kitchen scrub is a fan-favourite seasonal treat.
Toil and Trouble body scrub: A recurring Halloween Kitchen exclusive body scrub, inspired by the witches' chant from Shakespeare's Macbeth.
Toil and Trouble body scrub: Inspired by the witches' spell in Shakespeare's Macbeth — 'Double, double toil and trouble; fire burn and cauldron bubble.'
Wizard bubble bar: A cult Halloween Kitchen favourite that fans hunt down each year, originally released as a Halloween product before becoming a coveted Kitchen reappearance.
Wizard bubble bar: Originally released as a Halloween product, the Wizard bubble bar has reappeared periodically on the Lush Kitchen menu as a much-requested seasonal exclusive.

Wizard bubble bar: A Halloween bubble bar with roots in Lush's early seasonal product history, beloved for its whimsical wizard shape and distinctive fennel, tangerine, and juniperberry scent combination.
Burning Rosemary incense: A rare non-cosmetic Kitchen offering, beloved by fans who appreciate Lush's forays into home fragrance.
Burning Rosemary incense: A seasonal Kitchen exclusive incense product, part of Lush's Halloween and autumnal home fragrance offerings.
Burning Rosemary incense: Echoes the ancient tradition of burning rosemary for purification and protection, a perfect fit for Lush's autumnal witchy aesthetic.
Serpent Potion body butter: A Halloween Kitchen exclusive body butter that fans covet for its evocative, potion-inspired name and rich autumnal scent.
Serpent Potion body butter: A Halloween seasonal Kitchen exclusive, part of the 2025 autumnal spellcasting-themed range.
Serpent Potion body butter: Inspired by alchemical and folk magic traditions of serpent-based potions, fitting within Lush's Halloween spellcasting narrative for 2025.
Magic bath bomb: A long-coveted Kitchen classic that fans have chased for years, known for its incredibly powerful and lingering scent that even perfumed nearby catalogues.
Magic bath bomb: A recurring Lush Kitchen exclusive bath bomb that has appeared periodically since at least 2016, consistently selling out quickly due to high demand.

Magic bath bomb: A Kitchen classic that has returned multiple times since at least 2016, legendary among fans for its extraordinarily potent and long-lasting fragrance — reportedly strong enough to scent nearby Lush catalogues and packaging left in the same room.
texture_notes: Incantation shower gel: squeeze and lather
Toil and Trouble body scrub: sugar texture
Wizard bubble bar: crumbling and foam
Serpent Potion body butter: rich melt texture
Magic bath bomb: fizzing and colour swirls
